beginner.question: Active vs passive buzzer?
beginner.answer: Active has a built-in oscillator (apply Direct Current (DC)); passive needs an external Alternating Current (AC) tone.

beginner.question: How does a piezo buzzer work?
beginner.answer: A piezoelectric disc flexes with applied voltage, vibrating to make sound.

intermediate.question: Why 2-4kHz tone?
intermediate.answer: That range is most audible to humans at low power.

advanced.question: Drive a passive buzzer?
advanced.answer: Use a square wave from a timer/Microcontroller Unit (MCU) through a transistor.

expert.question: How vary pitch?
expert.answer: For passive types, change the drive frequency; active types are fixed.
